designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — animation-heavy with microinteractions, smooth transitions, entrance animations, parallax-inspired floating elements, and scroll-driven reveals. Clean spatial layout with layered card system, gradient accent blocks, and data-driven visual components.

screenDetails.home: Main feed with calm resonance score, active challenge strip, and whisper activity feed with like interactions
screenDetails.atlas: Wisdom Weaves spatial map with animated geo-dots, weave connection lines, filter pills, and spotlight cards
screenDetails.log: 4-step whisper creation flow: mood selection → place naming → notes/voice → tag selection → submission confirmation
screenDetails.rituals: Tabbed view of Ritual Kits (progress cards with lock states) and Sojourn Challenges (collaborative goals with participant counts)
screenDetails.journal: Personal journey stats grid, contribution heatmap calendar, expandable reflection entries with ritual kit context
